name: AgentScope
description: Builds multi-agent applications with a Python framework focused on transparency, observability, and tracing. Includes a runtime and studio for debugging. By Alibaba.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Apps
skills.description: Builds multi-agent applications with message passing, tools, and pluggable model backends in Python.

skills.name: Agent Observability
skills.description: Traces and visualizes agent execution to see, understand, and debug what each agent did and why.

skills.name: Agent Studio
skills.description: Provides a studio and runtime for developing, running, and monitoring agents interactively.
